question: Will the S&P 500 be between 6750 and 6774.9999 on Apr 9, 2026 at 4pm EDT?
reasoning: The S&P 500 closed at 6,782.81 on April 8, which is already above the target range of 6750-6774.9999. Given the major ceasefire news that drove a 2.51% rally, continued positive momentum is likely to keep the index above this range. The market would need to decline about 0.1-0.5% from current levels to fall into the target range, which seems unlikely given the bullish sentiment from geopolitical de-escalation.
key_factors: S&P 500 already above target range at 6,782.81
Oil prices falling from ceasefire news supporting broader market
Strong technical momentum from 2.51% gain on April 8
